mapper.sql: select i.interview_id, i.applicant_id, i.interview_type, i.interview_date, i.teaching_score, i.academic_score, i.defense_score, i.total_score, i.opinion, i.result, i.create_by, i.create_time, i.update_by, i.update_time, a.name as applicant_name, a.talent_level from tea_interview_record i left join tea_applicant a on a.applicant_id = i.applicant_id
mapper.insert: insert into tea_interview_record( applicant_id, interview_type, interview_date, teaching_score, academic_score, defense_score, total_score, opinion, result, create_by, create_time )values( #{applicantId}, #{interviewType}, #{interviewDate}, #{teachingScore}, #{academicScore}, #{defenseScore}, #{totalScore}, #{opinion}, #{result}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete: delete from tea_interview_record where interview_id in #{interviewId}
